CHAPTER XX
PROFESSION
I shall show m this chapter how astrolog}- can help people m
finding out which profession would suit them best. Likewise
we can read from a person's horoscope what profession his
would be father-in-law is following. As you arc aware the 10th
house is called the house of profession or Karma, which forms
the very foundation, as it were, of the edifice of human
life. It should be borne in mind that man is nothing without
action. Action is the be-all and end-all of human existence.
Man takes birth only to work out his past Karma and to do
